title: KB2005_11.C.21_1210_202206110231
description:
New version: KB2005_11.C.21_1210_202206110231

The newest OS update is available. This update optimizes the system stability, improves camera user experience and fixes some known issues.

System

[Improved] system stability

[Fixed] the issue that screen kept on abnormally in certain scenarios after locking

[Fixed] the issue that some gesture operations worked abnormally after enabling the Quick launch

Camera

[Fixed] the issue of crash when opening Ultra Steady in certain scenarios

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
